name: Rapid Impact
short_description: Rapid Impact is an online PvP-PvE shooter in a post-apocalyptic world. Fight players or AI in various modes. The game evolves with community feedback, shaping its future through player voting! Wishlist Rapid Impact now and be among the first to experience intense PvP-PvE battles!
detailed_description:
Rapid Impact is an online PvP-PvE shooter set in a realistic post-apocalyptic world. Choose your preferred weapons and compete for the top spot in each match. Play against real players, AI, or both together.

The game features several modes: Free-for-All, Team Deathmatch, Zone Control, and Capture the Flag.

From the Developer:
As a solo developer, I created Rapid Impact as a project driven by community feedback and player suggestions. At this stage, I’ve built the core gameplay, and new features will be gradually added based on majority votes from players. During early access, the game will include the essential mechanics and core gameplay - but this is just the beginning. The future of the project will depend on your support and feedback.
